description: This rugged pair of Arcan shoes from adidas makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and heavy duty durability. These shoes give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish on tough trekking terrain. You can team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperNubuck upper combined with woven fabric panels give lightweight feel, superior breathability and structureSuede toe counter for added durabilityLace-ups for snug FitIconic three stripes on the sides symbolising elegance and durability, and adding structure to the shoePadded collar and tongue for extra comfortLogo on the tongue and behind collarMidsoleShock-absorbing lightweight Phylon midsole for enhanced comfortOutsoleHigh abrasion resistant rubber on outsole for durabilityRugged tread design with lugs for superior tractionWash careBrush surface gently with a dry brush to remove dustDo not machine wash
